params.name: Untitled
params.description:
On Dec 28, 1961 AD, American painter Ryman created his white painting - Untitled.
Except for a smattering of blue and green, the Untitled is almost completely blank. Most people would mistake this painting for their own white walls, but this is Ryman's style. Most of his paintings are based on white, and the main purpose is to explore the relationship between the surface of the painting, light, and space. This method of expression is classified as minimalist by scholars, but Ryman considers h …
